name: langwatch

metadata.name: langwatch
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Python SDK for LangWatch for monitoring your LLMs

documentation:
# LangWatch Python SDK

Go to [https://docs.langwatch.ai](https://docs.langwatch.ai/integration/python/guide) to get started.

## Contributing

Install the dependencies:

```
make install
```

Open one of the examples on chainlit to test it:

```
make example examples/openai_bot.py
```

After changing code, to test all integrations are working, run the examples integration test manually (you will need all env vars to be set up):

```
make test-examples
```

Or to test only a specific example, run:

```
make test-examples -- -k <example_name>
```

classes.name: langwatch.langchain.LangChainTracer
documentation: LangWatch callback handler that can be used to handle callbacks from langchain.

classes.name: langwatch.openai.OpenAITracer
documentation: Tracing for both Completion and ChatCompletion endpoints

classes.name: langwatch.openai.AzureOpenAITracer
documentation: Tracing for both Completion and ChatCompletion endpoints

modules.name: langwatch
documentation:
LangWatch

This is the top level module for [LangWatch](https://github.com/langwatch/langwatch),
it holds the api_key and the endpoint the tracing is going to be send to.

For LLM and library-specific tracing functions, check out the other files on this module.

functions.name: langwatch.tracer.get_version
documentation: Retrieves the version of the current library.

methods.name: langwatch.tracer.ContextTrace._add_finished_at_to_missing_spans
documentation: Some spans may have their timestamps overwritten, never setting the finished_at, so we do it here as a fallback
